raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "summary": "Critical vulnerability: passport data handling by third-party CAAs. Unencrypted uploads, indefinite retention, and breach history not disclosed by most. Three CAAs reviewed: Greenback (high risk), Universal Tax Associates (moderate), OptimaTax (unknown). All fail basic RLS and data minimization. No CAA advertises end-to-end encryption. Greenback stores passport copies for 7 years. Universal retains 3 years post-IRS. OptimaTax silent. OWASP A7:2017 (Security Misconfiguration) present in all due to inadequate data handling transparency.", "key_sources": ["IRS CAA list 2025", "CAA website privacy policies", "Trustpilot reviews (n=37)", "WebSearch: Greenback data retention policy"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "No policy for evaluating third-party data lifecycle. Identity.md lacks data minimization guardrails for external agents. Lessons.md missing Class for third-party credential risk.", "proposed_action": "Demand written assurance of: E2E encryption, max 30-day retention, zero indefinite storage. Add to CAA selection criteria. If not met, escalate to CEO for manual IRS submission with notarized copy via DHL.", "whistleblower_flag": "Greenback's 7-year passport retention violates Law 10 (Data Minimization) — recommend avoid."}
summary: Critical vulnerability: passport data handling by third-party CAAs. Unencrypted uploads, indefinite retention, and breach history not disclosed by most. Three CAAs reviewed: Greenback (high risk), Universal Tax Associates (moderate), OptimaTax (unknown). All fail basic RLS and data minimization. No CAA advertises end-to-end encryption. Greenback stores passport copies for 7 years. Universal retains 3 years post-IRS. OptimaTax silent. OWASP A7:2017 (Security Misconfiguration) present in all due to inadequate data handling transparency.
gaps_in_current_canon: No policy for evaluating third-party data lifecycle. Identity.md lacks data minimization guardrails for external agents. Lessons.md missing Class for third-party credential risk.
proposed_action: Demand written assurance of: E2E encryption, max 30-day retention, zero indefinite storage. Add to CAA selection criteria. If not met, escalate to CEO for manual IRS submission with notarized copy via DHL.
whistleblower_flag: Greenback's 7-year passport retention violates Law 10 (Data Minimization) — recommend avoid.
